name: phantomshield-monorepo
description: PhantomShield monorepo — mobile app, backend API, and web dashboard
//workspaces-note: mobile is intentionally NOT a workspace. Expo/Metro/babel-preset-expo require the app's deps (expo-router, reanimated, worklets, react-native-web) to be co-located in mobile/node_modules; npm hoisting splits them and silently disables those babel plugins. Mobile is a standalone install that links @phantomshield/shared via a file: dependency.

scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present && npm run typecheck:mobile
